response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with broad full-stack and systems experience, but the resume shows minimal hands-on Java work and no demonstrated experience with Kotlin, the Spring ecosystem, JVM internals, or IDE/language tooling. The core required stack for this enterprise IDE/JVM role is largely absent; primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node, DLang, and web platforms.
strengths: Long track record building complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Some Java exposure (LabWindows/CVI era C/C++, robotic arms) and IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing libraries, workshops on internals
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only incidental Java; missing deep JVM understanding
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
No demonstrated work on IDE internals, language tooling, or enterprise build tools (Maven/Gradle)

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin or modern Java depth
Strong general engineering and tooling background
